members.name: instruments
members.doc: Instruments this strategy needs streamed. If absent, the runner uses a default set.

members.name: init
members.doc: Called once when the strategy starts

members.name: dispose
members.doc: Called when the strategy is stopped

members.name: getState
members.doc: Return current strategy state for live monitoring

members.name: restore
members.doc: For "checkpoint" recovery: restore from serialized state

members.name: recover
members.doc: For "custom" recovery: strategy handles its own recovery

StrategyContext.doc: Context passed to a strategy on each tick

members.name: backfilling
members.doc: True during candle replay (backfill recovery) — skip order placement

StrategyStateSnapshot.doc: Generic state snapshot returned by getState() for live display

StrategyIndicator.doc: A single indicator row for display on the live page

Broker.doc: Abstract broker interface — implemented by OANDA, Tradovate, etc.

members.name: getCandles
members.type: (instrument: Instrument, granularity: Granularity, count: number) => Promise<Candle[]>

members.name: getCandlesByRange
members.type: (instrument: Instrument, granularity: Granularity, from: Date, to: Date) => Promise<Candle[]>

members.name: streamPrices
members.type: (instruments: Instrument[], onTick: (tick: Tick) => void) => Promise<{ close: () => void }>

OrderRequest.doc: Order request sent to a broker

HedgingMode.doc:
Whether the strategy requires, forbids, or allows hedging accounts.
- "required" — needs hedging (simultaneous long/short on same instrument)
- "forbidden" — assumes netting (one position per instrument)
- "allowed" — works either way

RecoveryConfig.doc: Recovery mode configuration for live trading

Instrument.doc: A currency pair like "EUR_USD" (OANDA format uses underscore)
